description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ubuntu:xenial Docker image and defines a single stage called test. In the test stage add a job_test_100 job that runs the following script lines: `apt-get update && apt-get install -y apt-utils locales git && export TESTS=1 && export POSTGRESQL_VERSION=10`, `git clone https://gitlab.com/flectra-hq/developer-quality-tools.git ${CI_PROJECT_DIR}/developer-quality-tools && export PATH=${CI_PROJECT_DIR}/developer-quality-tools/gitlab-ci:${PATH}`, `ls -alh && gitlab_ci_install_flectra`, and `su - flectra -c "export PATH=${CI_PROJECT_DIR}/developer-quality-tools/gitlab-ci:${PATH} && gitlab_run_tests"`. Also add a job_test_96 job in the same test stage that runs the same four script lines except the first line omits the POSTGRESQL_VERSION export (`apt-get update && apt-get install -y apt-utils locales git && export TESTS=1`). No caches, artifacts, or conditional rules are defined.
